body:
APPROVE
Clean refactor that removes the brittle substring classifier in favor of typed-at-source `FilterReason`. Each rejection site in `buildHarnessCandidates` and `CheckGating` now sets the category authoritatively, and the existing classification test was strengthened to prove the public mapping ignores free-form Reason text. Coverage of all five rejection categories at the rejection site is solid.

error: failed to push some refs to 'https://github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/agent.git': exit status 1
Clean refactor that removes the brittle substring classifier in favor of typed-at-source `FilterReason`. Each rejection site in `buildHarnessCandidates` and `CheckGating` now sets the category authoritatively, and the existing classification test was strengthened to prove the public mapping ignores free-form Reason text. Coverage of all five rejection categories at the rejection site is solid.
